featuresReviewed.correctness: Seed rows + RLS + profile extension match contract; migration applies cleanly.
featuresReviewed.security: RLS on plans: public SELECT only, writes service-role only. Verified by 3 RLS tests (anon INSERT rejected, UPDATE silent 0-rows, DELETE silent 0-rows).
featuresReviewed.quality: Migration idempotent-safe with IF EXISTS drop on the old subscription_status constraint; defensive UPDATE migrates any legacy 'cancelled' rows.
featuresReviewed.consistency: Follows existing migration filename convention YYYYMMDDHHMMSS_<description>.sql.
featuresReviewed.testing: 11 assertions across seed integrity, RLS, profile FK, and Stripe-canonical 'canceled' status.

featuresReviewed.correctness: 401/400/200 paths covered; lazy customer creation + reuse paths correct.
featuresReviewed.security: Auth gate before plan lookup; no user-controlled Stripe call arguments besides plan_id (resolved server-side to stripe_price_id from plans).
featuresReviewed.quality: Memoized Stripe client via stripeClient(); stripe-mock wiring via env vars keeps tests fast.
featuresReviewed.consistency: Error shapes match existing routes ({error: string}).
featuresReviewed.testing: 11 unit + 2 stripe-mock integration — live wiring proven.

featuresReviewed.correctness: All 5 event types + idempotency + signature + tolerance covered by integration tests.
featuresReviewed.security: Uses service-role client (intentional for webhook). Raw body read before any parsing — no signature bypass. STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET required; missing yields 500 so misconfig is visible.
featuresReviewed.quality: Event dispatch is a small switch; each handler lives in its own named function with narrow types.
featuresReviewed.consistency: Customer / subscription / invoice unwrappers all follow the same shape.
featuresReviewed.testing: 13 integration tests signing real events through Stripe SDK + live Supabase.
issues: Handler failure after processed_stripe_events insert leaves the event unretried on second delivery. Acceptable for M2; M8 hardening should add a dead-letter queue.

featuresReviewed.security: Auth gate; caller's stripe_customer_id pinned to return_url on app origin.

featuresReviewed.correctness: Every status/date combination from the contract covered. Chat gate correctly uses OWNER user_id, not caller.
featuresReviewed.security: Uses service-role client (needed for anonymous widget path to resolve site owner). Profile read is narrow: only subscription_status + trial_ends_at + current_period_end.
featuresReviewed.quality: Pure function output; no side effects.

featuresReviewed.correctness: View-model branches match subscription-gate state machine. Change-plan path correctly passes proration_behavior='create_prorations'.
featuresReviewed.security: Uses user-scoped supabase server client (RLS enforces ownership). Stripe invoice list scoped by stripe_customer_id.
featuresReviewed.quality: Page logic extracted into pure view-model helper for deterministic unit coverage. Client actions kept thin — POSTs + redirects.
featuresReviewed.consistency: Visual style matches existing dashboard design tokens (--ink-primary, surface-hairline, etc.).
issues: UI assertions VAL-BILLING-002/003/024/025 need Playwright confirmation; pattern matches foundation milestone's deferred AUTH assertions.

sharedStateUpdates.AGENTS.md: No changes required — M2 added no new boundary rules.
sharedStateUpdates.servicesYaml: stripe-mock commands already present (added in M1 prep).
sharedStateUpdates.libraryFiles: No updates needed; next stack update lands with M3 (usage_counters + meter UI).
